title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Sanji as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is exactly what I needed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to disguise myself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Secret Weapon that his brother gave him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmmm? Is that a can that you're holding?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Soba shop owner actually appeared!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is he stupid!? He's just going to get himself killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... If he had waited any longer, the whole town would've been turned to ruins!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you doing, sangoro!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't see a problem with leaving the town to its fate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're up against an Emperor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being stubborn doesn't always work when trying to save some- one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So, if I throw away my pride...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I may be able to save them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, that's assuming that THIS THING here has the power to help....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Simply wearing this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doesn't make me part of Germa!! So I might as well try it out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: SPX: Which

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whoa, what!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, you shouldn't strip down in public.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell is Thaaaaaat!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A Trans- Forma- Tion!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's so cool! What is that technology!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why is he on the roof!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why is he wearing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That suit!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's, without a doubt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Germa 66's No.3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stealth Black!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you know so much about it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Everybody from the north blue knows!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care!! Never call me that again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used to read the comic strip, and I always hated Germa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I hate Em, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Looks like you're not just a simple SOBA shop owner.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Tell me your name!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm... O-Soba Mask!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's so lame!!! Please come up with something else!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let us name you instead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, Lizard!! Let's do this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It's time to see what the power of science is capable of....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
